name:directed_edge_key: # ^ SkillEdges is a graph_edge file attached to SkillTree.tsv (see Files.tsv
# ^ edgesFor column). It carries per-edge metadata that wouldn't fit on the
# ^ node — here, how many levels you need in the *parent* skill before you
# ^ can train the *child* skill. The PK column is `directed_edge_key`,
# ^ The engine enforces three things on this file (Phase A5):
# ^   - every endpoint exists as a row in SkillTree.tsv
# ^   - the (parent, child) pair matches a declared link in SkillTree
# ^     (i.e. the child lists the parent in graphParents)
# ^   - the edge family must match the node family (graph_edge ↔ graph_node)
# ^ The `comment` column is engine-owned (inherited from graph_edge).

comment:comment|nil: Move quietly while following a quarry
Detect the faintest traces of prey
Keep pace with a fleeing target
